title: Interface Troubleshooting
steps: Check administrative state and interface configuration.
Check errors, CRC, speed, duplex, and counters.
Check MAC learning and VLAN placement.
Escalate only after physical, endpoint, and patching checks are complete.
do_not_touch: Do not change VLAN, trunk mode, port-channel membership, or reboot equipment until link state, config, and MAC learning are confirmed.
